items.title: anarchic illustrations
items.content_html:
Drawings, prints and stickers promoting the abolition of traditional forms of government and institutions.

All my anarchic themed illustrations are available as high-res downloads, available under CC by 4.0 on Ko-Fi.

items.title: Vegetable Portraits
items.content_html:
Portraits of my favourite and seasonal vegetables created using a variety of artistic mediums, they act as consistent theme that records changes in art style.

Autumn Pumpkins
